name: Khalix: True Financial Awareness, True Competitive Advantage
description: Aberdeen Group profiles Longview Solutions' Khalix 2.1 financial management software, arguing it represents a superior approach to integrated enterprise financial management by combining consolidation, budgeting, forecasting, and analysis in a single truly integrated system built on Relational OLAP technology. The study contends Khalix's object-oriented hierarchical engine eliminates the cracks between loosely integrated point solutions and guarantees Longview a position on enterprise technology buyers' must-RFP shortlist.
